heading: Explain Results
body:
The `explain` method returns a BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation) document with the following fields.

| Option                   | Type             | Necessity | Purpose                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------ | ---------------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| collectors               | document         | Optional  | Describes the execution statistics for the collector.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| metadata                 | document         | Optional  | Contains useful metadata.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| query                    | document         | Optional  | Describes the execution statistics for the query. This is not present at the the top level for indexPartitionExplain.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| resultMaterialization    | document         | Optional  | Details related to retrieving per-document data after query execution. This is not returned for queryPlanner verbosity mode.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| resourceUsage            | document         | Optional  | Details the resource usage of the query when it was executed. This is not returned for queryPlanner verbosity mode.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| vectorTracing            | array of objects | Optional  | Tracing details, such as the following, about vectors in the specified documents:Whether MongoDB Vector Search visited the vector during query execution, whether the vector appeared in the MongoDB Vector Search result set, and if not, why the vector was dropped.Whether the vector is generally reachable because some vectors might not be reachable due to Hierarchical Navigable Small Worlds's probabilistic nature. |
| luceneVectorSegmentStats | array of objects | Optional  | Per-Lucene segment details of $vectorSearch query execution.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
